allow: PowerShell(git init; git add .; Write-Output "===STAGED FILE COUNT==="; \(git diff --cached --name-only | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "===CHECK SECRETS NOT STAGED \(should be empty\)==="; git diff --cached --name-only | Select-String -Pattern "node_modules|\\.env$"; Write-Output "===STAGED FILES==="; git diff --cached --name-only)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "---winget check---"; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Write-Output "--- SRV lookup ---"; try { Resolve-DnsName -Type SRV "_mongodb._tcp.cluster0.oddrmbj.mongodb.net" -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object NameTarget, Port } catch { Write-Output "SRV FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output "--- Internet check ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.google.com" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8\).StatusCode } catch { Write-Output "NET FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(try { Resolve-DnsName -Type TXT "cluster0.oddrmbj.mongodb.net" -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Strings } catch { Write-Output "TXT FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
